projectDescription: TokenSupply is an all-in-one operating system for digital goods sellers — covering product cataloging, inventory key management, vendor procurement, multi-channel sales, order fulfilment, invoicing, and support tickets in a single workspace.
keyFeatures: Encrypted digital key vault with masked reveals and full audit log
Multi-channel selling across Shopify, G2A, and other marketplaces
Vendor management with purchase orders, pricing offers, and stock collection
Automated order fulfilment with branded customer delivery portal
Invoicing with inclusive/exclusive tax and PDF generation
Ticketing system with SLA tracking, replacements, and AI-assisted summaries
Role-based access for Super Admin, Admin, Support, and Vendor roles
Analytics dashboard with revenue, product, vendor, and customer insights
Internal team chat with entity-linked threads
Custom domains, branding, SMTP email, and Order ID formats
publicApiSurface: Dashboard KPI metrics (revenue, orders, active inventory, open tickets, credits)
Products catalog with SKU, functional category, and product type
Inventory key statuses: Available, Reserved, Sold, Invalid
Purchase Order lifecycle: Draft → Confirmed → Payment Pending → Paid → Closed
Shopify integration: shop domain + Admin API token, auto-deliver mapping
G2A integration: Client ID, Client Secret, API URL, Token URL, auto sync
Vendor Offers: price + delivery time per vendor-product pair
Transaction statuses: Pending, Completed, Failed, Refunded
Invoice statuses: Draft, Confirmed (with PDF export)
Ticket lifecycle: Open → In Progress → Awaiting → Resolved → Closed
Team roles: Super Admin, Admin, Support, Vendor
Notification types: PO updates, ticket events, team joins, expiring inventory, low stock, low credits
Credit model: 1 key delivered = 1 credit consumed
Settings tabs: General, Email Setup, Domain, Notifications, Store Page
